texto: Critter: I was fairly relieved when Sea took off on her own. She was wearing some two-sizes-too-small T-shirt, practically forcing my eyes to home in on “the girls,” and all I could think was I’m going to turn into a pillar of salt.
explicacao: Citação de Lara Deloza sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Critter: I was fairly relieved when Sea took off on her own. She was wearing some two-sizes-too-s…” articula reflexao, funny, critter em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
